---
name: Migration Task
about: Track a migration task from the legacy .NET app to M365
labels: migration
---

## Migration Task

**Source Module:** [OBS / CWA]
**Target Platform:** [SPFx + Power Fx / Power Apps + Power Fx]

### Source Files
- [ ] List relevant .NET source files

### Migration Steps
- [ ] Identify UI patterns
- [ ] Map data model to target (Dataverse / SharePoint Lists)
- [ ] Generate scaffold code
- [ ] Validate business logic mapping

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Target component renders equivalent UI
- [ ] Data model is mapped correctly
- [ ] Business logic is preserved
